SELECT RGG_IRI FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP WHERE RGG_MEMBER_PATTERN IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP WHERE RGG_COMMENT IS NOT NULL AND RGG_MEMBER_PATTERN = 'PatternX';
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_CREATE ('Graph1', 1); SELECT * FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP WHERE RGG_IRI LIKE 'Graph%';

DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_CREATE ('TestGroup1', 1); DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_CREATE ('TestGroup2', 2); SELECT * FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP WHERE RGG_IID IN (SELECT RGG_IID FROM DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP WHERE RGG_IRI LIKE 'TestGroup%');
